data.body:
4/ Does it matter for rates though? 

Not necessarily. 

While the Board Chair might change, the FOMC Chair—who controls monetary policy—is elected by the committee. Powell was elected for all of 2026. As long as he stays on the Board, the "safe pair of hands" likely remains in control.
